headings: Section 35. Default; Termination; Termination for Convenience.
text: Section 41. Inspection  of  Site.  Subcontractor  represents  that  it  has  examined  all  of  the  Contract  Documents which relate to the Subcontract Work and is fully acquainted with all of the physical conditions surrounding the Project site insofar as the same affects or relates to the performance of the Subcontract Work, and has made all necessary investigations essential to the full understanding of any and all difficulties that may be encountered in the
